evidence_boundary.social: All KOL posts, screenshots, personal entries, profit descriptions, role labels, and dashboard claims.
evidence_boundary.onchain: Surf BSC transfer queries and wallet-label results for the resolved token contracts.
evidence_boundary.market: Surf DEX-pool-weighted OHLCV with zero-volume future carry-forward bars excluded.
evidence_boundary.inference: The strategy gates and proposed runtime fields derived from separated social, on-chain, and market evidence.
evidence_boundary.official: No official source was required to promote a live trade action; no live trade action was promoted.

adopted_rules.name: equal_tranche_fresh_wallet_fanout
adopted_rules.rule: Near-equal, same-source, short-window CEX withdrawals into many recipients raise common-control confidence. Direction remains unknown until next-hop evidence resolves it.

adopted_rules.name: operator_cluster_conflict_gate
adopted_rules.rule: Active distribution in any verified sibling cluster blocks follow language produced by a separate accumulation cluster. Mixed flow remains Observe; held exposure enters Reduce watch.

verified_cases.lesson: Fan-out is a valid discovery signal. Cluster-distribution conflict and next-hop evidence decide the action.
A small test followed by a same-route large withdrawal is a high-quality discovery pattern.

reference_only: Automatic operator-role attribution from a bubble chart.
Inventory hedging fields before a real project position requires them.
Unverified SIREN control-rate and exchange-account-count claims.

runtime_gap.current: alpha_intraday_flow_watch covers CEX deposit candidates and gas priming; holder concentration lacks a persistent role-weighted cluster inventory timeline.
runtime_gap.next_safe_unit: Add a read-only cex_withdrawal_cluster object with equal-tranche, recipient-freshness, label-quality, next-hop, and conflict fixtures.
required_fixtures: CEX outflow concurrent with verified cluster distribution
